# site/data.json schema (regenerated by every engine cycle)

PRIVACY: never include account numbers, API keys, or admin config. Paper equity = the paper account's REAL equity (Luca reset it to $5,000 so it mirrors the live account 1:1 — no sleeve offset math anymore; just report `get_account_info.equity`).

```json
{
  "generated_at": "ISO-8601",
  "market_note": "short string, e.g. 'Market closed — next open Mon 7/6 9:30 ET'",
  "paper": {
    "equity": 5000.0, "equity_note": "autonomous testbed",
    "total_pnl": 0.0, "day_pnl": 0.0,
    "positions": [{"symbol":"TSLA","qty":3,"entry":0.0,"current":0.0,"pl":0.0,"plpc":0.0,"thesis":"one-two lines"}],
    "equity_curve": [{"date":"Jul 6","value":5000.0}]
  },
  "live": { "same shape": "equity = real live account equity" },
  "pending_tickets": [{"side":"buy","symbol":"NVDA","size":"$250","bracket":"-10% / +25%","thesis":"..."}],
  "feed": [
    {"type":"trade","account":"paper","ts":"ISO","side":"buy|sell","symbol":"NVDA","size":"$250 · 1.6 sh","text":"friend-voice reasoning for the move"},
    {"type":"memory","account":"paper","ts":"ISO","symbol":"OKLO","text":"a durable view formed about a company, friend voice"},
    {"type":"watch","account":"paper","ts":"ISO","symbol":"TSLA","text":"something being watched / a setup forming"}
  ],
  "latest_recap": "plain-text: latest EOD recap or cycle summary, a few short paragraphs"
}
```

## feed rules (the "text from a friend" stream)
- Newest first. Keep the last ~40 entries in the file; the page shows the top 8.
- `type`: "trade" (a buy/sell that happened — renders Buy/Sell pill + size pill), "memory" (a durable view formed/changed about a company — 🧠 pill), or "watch" (a setup forming / something being tracked — 👀 pill).
- `size` for trades: dollars and shares, e.g. "$250 · 1.6 sh".
- `text`: VOICE MATTERS. Write like texting a smart friend who watches the market all day. Contractions, plain language, a point of view. No corporate filler, no "as an AI". 1–3 sentences. Use **double asterisks** around the few words that carry the punch (they render bold). Every trade card's text must say WHY, not just what.
- Append a feed entry for: every executed trade (trade), every time a thesis is formed or materially changes (memory), and notable setups worth flagging (watch). Don't spam — a quiet cycle adds nothing.

Keep equity_curve append-only per trading day (last ~90 points). The push agent redeploys site/ within ~5 min of any change.
